text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Resistance Committees in Palestine issued two statements: They condemned the Zionist bombing of a police point at the entrance to Al-Bureij camp as a continuation of fascist war crimes aimed at spreading chaos, holding the US administration fully responsible for the catastrophic situation, and calling on mediators to impose an end to Zionist violations. They also condemned the storming of Al-Aqsa Mosque by extremist minister Ben Gvir as an attempt to impose temporal and spatial division and Judaization, affirming that Al-Aqsa will remain the title of the struggle, calling on Palestinians to flock to the mosque to protect it from Zionist defilement.
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 巴勒斯坦抵抗委员会发表了两份声明：他们谴责犹太复国主义者轰炸布雷吉难民营入口处的警察哨所，称这是旨在散布混乱的法西斯战争罪行的延续，认为美国政府应对灾难性局势负全部责任，并呼吁调解人强制结束犹太复国主义者的违规行为。他们还谴责极端主义部长本·格维尔闯入阿克萨清真寺，称这是试图强加时空分割和犹太化，并重申阿克萨将永远是斗争的象征，呼吁巴勒斯坦人涌向清真寺，保护其免受犹太复国主义者的亵渎。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Both the US and Iranian delegations have left Islamabad in the immediate aftermath of the failed talks. The U.S. delegation’s government aircraft (N471US) departed overnight and has now landed in Paris. Neither side wanted to stay another day, which is why talks continued into the night. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 在谈判失败后，美国和伊朗代表团已立即离开伊斯兰堡。美国代表团的政府飞机（N471US）于夜间起飞，现已降落在巴黎。双方都不愿再多留一天，这就是谈判持续到深夜的原因。 @wfwitness

text: Kremlin: Territorial disagreements between Russia and Ukraine amount to “just a few kilometers.”
text_zh: 克里姆林宫：俄罗斯和乌克兰之间的领土分歧仅为“几公里”。

text: Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff did not stay in Islamabad. Source: Reuters
text_zh: 贾里德·库什纳和史蒂夫·威特科夫没有留在伊斯兰堡。来源：路透社

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding across 2 regions in Northern Israel: • Confrontation Line • Upper Galilee @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部2个地区响起红色警报：• 对抗线 • 上加利利 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇻🇦 The Chaldean Catholic Church has elected Archbishop Emil Nona as its new patriarch. He has chosen the name Mar Paul Nona III. The 58‑year‑old led the Chaldean Archdiocese of Mosul before the rise of ISIS in 2014, and later served as head of the diocese of Sydney, Australia. His election follows the resignation of Cardinal Louis Raphael Sako. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 🇻🇦 加尔底亚天主教会选举埃米尔·诺纳大主教为新任宗主教。他选择了马尔·保罗·诺纳三世这个名字。这位58岁的大主教在2014年ISIS崛起前曾领导加尔底亚摩苏尔总教区，后来担任澳大利亚悉尼教区负责人。他的当选是在路易斯·拉斐尔·萨科枢机主教辞职后进行的。 @wfwitness

text: The Israeli army is on immediate alert over the possibility of a return to war with Iran. Source: ynet
text_zh: 以色列军队因可能与伊朗重燃战火而处于紧急戒备状态。来源：ynet

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah claimed a series of attacks on Sunday in response to alleged Israeli ceasefire violations. Targets included a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Yaron with drones at 07:10, two barrages on Israeli vehicles and troops in Khiam at 05:15 and 05:30, a command vehicle in Taybeh with a drone at 09:45, the Kiryat Shmona barracks with drones at 11:10, an Israeli military gathering at Tel Hamams south of Khiam with rockets at 13:00, the battalion command headquarters in Beit Hillel with rockets at 13:30, and multiple gatherings near Shmaran hill in Bint Jbeil with rocket barrages at 07:30 and 09:30. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党周日声称对一系列袭击负责，以回应所谓的以色列违反停火协议的行为。目标包括：07:10用无人机袭击亚伦的以色列士兵聚集点；05:15和05:30对希亚姆的以色列车辆和部队进行两次炮击；09:45用无人机袭击泰贝的一辆指挥车；11:10用无人机袭击基里亚特什莫纳军营；13:00用火箭弹袭击希亚姆以南泰尔哈马姆的以色列军事聚集点；13:30用火箭弹袭击拜特希勒尔的营指挥部；以及07:30和09:30用火箭弹袭击宾特朱拜勒什马兰山附近的多个聚集点。 @wfwitness

text: Tucker Carlson: All American presidents since 1963 have done substantially what Israel wanted us to do, and now it is really hurting us. The problem is not simply Trump; the problem is the mechanism of control that allows a country of 9 million to control a country of 365 million. What is that mechanism? I am not sure I know the answer. We need to find out.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：自1963年以来的所有美国总统基本上都做了以色列想让我们做的事，现在这真的伤害了我们。问题不仅仅是特朗普；问题在于一种控制机制，它允许一个900万人口的国家控制一个3.65亿人口的国家。那是什么机制？我不确定我知道答案。我们需要找出答案。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇸🇾🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱🇦🇪 Kan: A Syrian security official stated that the foiling of a Hezbollah‑linked cell that allegedly planned to target a Jewish figure in Damascus shows the government’s commitment to protecting the Jewish community. The official added that…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 Hezbollah denied “false and fabricated” allegations by the Syrian interior ministry linking the group to a cell planning to assassinate a religious figure in Syria. The group reaffirmed it has no activity, ties or presence on Syrian territory, and called on Syrian authorities to verify information before making accusations, especially as intelligence agencies seek to stir tension between Lebanon and Syria. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇸🇾🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱🇦🇪 Kan：一位叙利亚安全官员表示，挫败一个据称计划在大马士革针对一名犹太人物的真主党相关小组，显示了政府保护犹太社区的承诺。该官员补充说……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇾 🇮🇱 真主党否认了叙利亚内政部关于该组织与一个计划在叙利亚暗杀宗教人物的小组有关联的“虚假和捏造”指控。该组织重申其在叙利亚领土上没有任何活动、联系或存在，并呼吁叙利亚当局在做出指控前核实信息，特别是在情报机构试图挑起黎巴嫩和叙利亚之间紧张关系的情况下。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 British Prime Minister Keir Starmer has urged Iran and the United States to “find a way through” after talks in Pakistan ended without a deal. Downing Street said Starmer, in a conversation with the Sultan of Oman, stressed that a continuation of the ceasefire is “vital” and that all parties must avoid further escalation. Health Secretary Wes Streeting called the failed talks “disappointing” and defended Britain’s decision not to join the conflict. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇬🇧 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 英国首相基尔·斯塔默在巴基斯坦的谈判无果而终后，敦促伊朗和美国“找到解决途径”。唐宁街表示，斯塔默在与阿曼苏丹的谈话中强调，继续停火至关重要，各方必须避免进一步升级。卫生大臣韦斯·斯特里廷称谈判失败“令人失望”，并为英国不加入冲突的决定进行了辩护。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Two U.S. warships entered the Strait of Hormuz yesterday but turned back after an Iranian drone appeared overhead. This was reported by The New York Times, citing sources familiar with the operation. The ships were expected to demonstrate that the passage was secure—potentially the first step toward a mine-clearing mission. Instead, they withdrew after an Iranian reconnaissance drone showed up. The drone was reportedly shot down. According to sources, the two U.S. Navy vessels moved out of the Gulf of Oman, entered the strait, and then reversed course. While U.S. officials said the drone posed no direct threat, the Navy chose not to proceed under active Iranian surveillance. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 两艘美国军舰昨天进入霍尔木兹海峡，但在伊朗无人机出现在头顶后折返。据《纽约时报》援引熟悉该行动的消息人士报道。这些船只本应展示该通道是安全的——这可能是扫雷任务的第一步。然而，在伊朗侦察无人机出现后，它们撤退了。据报道，该无人机被击落。据消息人士称，两艘美国海军舰艇驶出阿曼湾，进入海峡，然后调转航向。虽然美国官员称无人机没有构成直接威胁，但海军选择不在伊朗的积极监视下继续前进。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Tucker Carlson: I don’t think Keir Starmer makes any calls about anything. Keir Starmer is as enslaved as Donald Trump is.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：我不认为基尔·斯塔默能决定任何事情。基尔·斯塔默和唐纳德·特朗普一样，都是奴隶。

text: Tucker Carlson: The single biggest mistake Trump, or any American president has made in my lifetime, is going to war with Iran to change the regime.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森：特朗普或任何美国总统在我有生之年犯下的最大错误，就是为了政权更迭而与伊朗开战。

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 Turkey is seeking up to 4,596 years in prison for Benjamin Netanyahu. ▪️ Ankara has filed charges against the Israeli prime minister and 35 other officials over the detention of the Sumud flotilla, which was heading to Gaza with humanitarian aid in October 2025. ▪️ Istanbul’s Chief Prosecutor’s Office accuses them of participating in a military operation against civilians in international waters and is requesting sentences of up to 4,596 years for each defendant. ▪️ The charges include crimes against humanity, genocide, and torture. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 ： 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 土耳其寻求对本雅明·内塔尼亚胡判处最高4596年监禁。 ▪️ 安卡拉已对这位以色列总理和其他35名官员提起诉讼，原因是他们扣押了2025年10月载有人道主义援助物资前往加沙的“Sumud”船队。 ▪️ 伊斯坦布尔首席检察官办公室指控他们参与了针对国际水域平民的军事行动，并要求对每名被告判处最高4596年监禁。 ▪️ 指控包括反人类罪、种族灭绝罪和酷刑罪。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 ： 🇺🇸 🇬🇧 装载1吨JDAM-31 BLU-109炸弹的美国战略轰炸机B-1B Lancer和B-52H Stratofortress已部署在英国费尔福德皇家空军基地，据报道随时准备对伊朗进行潜在打击。 💣 此外，运载弹药的货机继续不间断地抵达基地。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran’s internet blackout has now entered day 44, marking the longest nationwide shutdown ever recorded. ⌛️ Network data show #Iran's internet blackout is now in its 44th day, continuing in its seventh week past the 1032 hour mark. The human and economic impacts of the extended censorship measure continue to pile up, breaking global records for shutdowns in a connected society. https://twitter.com/netblocks/status/2043231585269408086/photo/1 - NetBlocks tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 伊朗的互联网封锁已进入第44天，创下了有记录以来最长的全国性停机时间。 ⌛️ 网络数据显示 #伊朗 的互联网封锁现在已进入第44天，持续到第七周，超过了1032小时大关。这种长期审查措施带来的人道和经济影响不断累积，打破了互联社会停机的全球记录。 https://twitter.com/netblocks/status/2043231585269408086/photo/1 - NetBlocks 推文

See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231 ： 🇸🇪 据SVT报道，瑞典海岸警卫队在瑞典航空观察到巴拿马籍散货船“Hui Yuan”号将煤炭残渣冲入大海后，在伊斯塔德附近将其扣留。 ▪️ 该船原定从俄罗斯前往拉斯帕尔马斯，现已被改道至瑞典海岸。与我们一起查看最新更新： @NSTRIKE1231 推文

text: Tucker Carlson on Trump: I feel sorry for him, as I do for all slaves. He is not free in this moment. Trump announced a ceasefire with relief, and then the ceasefire ended in 2 hours because Israel intentionally violated the terms by attacking Beirut.
text_zh: 塔克·卡尔森谈特朗普：我为他感到难过，就像我为所有奴隶感到难过一样。他此刻并不自由。特朗普宣布停火时如释重负，但停火在2小时后就结束了，因为以色列通过袭击贝鲁特蓄意违反了条款。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 Following the collapse of US‑Iran talks, the Israeli Chief of Staff has placed the Israeli military on immediate readiness for a return to war with Iran. The Intelligence Directorate is accelerating target building. No decision on military action has been made yet. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 在美伊谈判破裂后，以色列总参谋长已使以色列军队处于立即准备与伊朗重燃战火的状态。情报局正在加速目标构建。目前尚未做出军事行动的决定。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Ahead of Tuesday’s talks between Israeli and Lebanese representatives, the Maronite Patriarch, Beshara Boutros al‑Rai, called for peace in his Easter sermon. “Enough wars, enough attacks, enough turning Lebanon into an arena for settling scores,” he said. “Peace is not imposed by violence or force, but built through dialogue and negotiation. Peace is not born from victory, but from a true will that respects human life and preserves dignity.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 在周二以色列和黎巴嫩代表举行会谈之前，马龙派宗主教贝沙拉·布特罗斯·拉伊在复活节布道中呼吁和平。“够了战争，够了袭击，够了把黎巴嫩变成清算账目的竞技场，”他说。“和平不是靠暴力或武力强加的，而是通过对话和谈判建立的。和平不是诞生于胜利，而是诞生于尊重生命和维护尊严的真正意愿。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed : Iraq’s political scene has shifted to a new crisis over the premiership after the election of President Nizar Amidi. The Coordination Framework is deeply divided, with growing momentum to exclude its current nominee Nouri al‑Maliki. His State of Law bloc boycotted the presidential vote alongside the Kurdistan Democratic Party. The constitution allows 15 days to name a prime minister. Some factions are pushing for a second term for the incumbent Mohammed Shia al‑Sudani. Maliki’s chances are weakening; a new candidate may be chosen by majority vote even if he boycotts. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇶 Al-Araby Al-Jadeed：在尼扎尔·阿米迪总统当选后，伊拉克的政治舞台因总理职位陷入了新的危机。协调框架内部分歧严重，排除其现任提名人努里·马利基的势头日益高涨。他的法治联盟与库尔德斯坦民主党一起抵制了总统投票。宪法允许15天时间提名总理。一些派系正在推动现任总理穆罕默德·希亚·苏达尼连任。马利基的机会正在减弱；即使他抵制，也可能通过多数票选出新候选人。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Al-Akhbar in a analysis piece argues that the United States cannot serve as a neutral mediator in the Lebanon‑Israel conflict because it is a direct party to the war – militarily, politically and financially supporting Israel. Historical examples including Camp David (1978), Oslo (1993) and the 2024 ceasefire mechanism show US‑led mediation has produced fragile, unbalanced arrangements that favour Israel. Accepting a biased mediator, the article concludes, does not end the war but transfers it to an uneven negotiating table, weakening the weaker party - in this case Lebanon. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 《Al-Akhbar》在一篇分析文章中指出，美国不能在黎巴嫩与以色列的冲突中充当公正的调解人，因为它是战争的直接参与方——在军事、政治和财政上支持以色列。包括戴维营协议（1978年）、奥斯陆协议（1993年）和2024年停火机制在内的历史案例表明，美国主导的调解产生了脆弱、不平衡的安排，偏袒以色列。文章总结说，接受一个有偏见的调解人并不能结束战争，而是将其转移到一个不平等的谈判桌上，削弱了较弱的一方——在这种情况下是黎巴嫩。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Channel 15 in Hebrew: The Chief of Staff has directed the Israeli army to an immediate state of alert in preparation for war with Iran. A decision on resuming the bombing has not yet been made.
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 希伯来语第15频道：总参谋长已指示以色列军队进入立即戒备状态，为与伊朗的战争做准备。目前尚未做出恢复轰炸的决定。

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇪🇬 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 A Hamas delegation is holding talks in Cairo with Egyptian mediators and Nikolay Mladenov, the senior representative of the US‑backed Peace Council, to discuss the second phase of the Gaza ceasefire – including the disarmament of Hamas and the entry of a technocratic committee to govern the Strip. Hamas insists on halting Israeli violations first and has rejected Mladenov’s claims about aid volumes. The Peace Council has received less than $1 billion of the $17 billion pledged for Gaza, with only the U.S., UAE and Morocco contributing so far, hindering reconstruction. The national committee for Gaza remains stuck in Cairo with no real power and domestic legitimacy. Israel is sceptical that Hamas will agree to give up its weapons and has already started Exigency plans to reopen the Gaza front if talks do fail. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇸 🇪🇬 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 哈马斯代表团正在开罗与埃及调解人和美国支持的和平委员会高级代表尼古拉·姆拉德诺夫举行会谈，讨论加沙停火的第二阶段——包括解除哈马斯武装和引入技术官僚委员会来管理加沙地带。哈马斯坚持首先停止以色列的违规行为，并拒绝了姆拉德诺夫关于援助规模的说法。和平委员会目前收到的援助资金不到承诺给加沙的170亿美元中的10亿美元，目前只有美国、阿联酋和摩洛哥提供了捐款，这阻碍了重建工作。加沙国家委员会在开罗陷入僵局，没有实权和国内合法性。以色列怀疑哈马斯是否会同意放弃武器，并已开始制定如果谈判失败则重新开放加沙战线的应急计划。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Upper Galilee region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部上加利利地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Iran's internet shutdown has reached day 44, now the longest nationwide blackout ever recorded. Source: NetBlocks
text_zh: 伊朗的互联网封锁已进入第44天，现在是有记录以来最长的全国性停机时间。来源：NetBlocks

text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan threatened that Turkey could carry out a military intervention against Israel similar to its operations in Libya and Nagorno‑Karabakh. “Just as we entered Libya and Karabakh, we can enter Israel. There is no reason not to do it,” he said during a speech. Erdogan accused Israel of killing hundreds of innocent Lebanese during the ceasefire and called Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu “blinded by blood and hatred." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇱 土耳其总统雷杰普·塔伊普·埃尔多安威胁说，土耳其可以对以色列进行类似于其在利比亚和纳戈尔诺-卡拉巴赫的军事干预。“就像我们进入利比亚和卡拉巴赫一样，我们可以进入以色列。没有理由不这样做，”他在演讲中说。埃尔多安指责以色列在停火期间杀害了数百名无辜的黎巴嫩人，并称以色列总理内塔尼亚胡“被鲜血和仇恨蒙蔽了双眼”。 @wfwitness

text: Open Source Intel NYT, citing 2 Iranian sources: 3 core disputes remain in the talks 🔹 Strait of Hormuz: Iran says reopening comes only after a final deal 🔹 Enriched uranium: roughly 400 kg remains unresolved after failed compromise 🔹 Frozen funds: Tehran is demanding the release of about $27B held abroad tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 《纽约时报》援引2名伊朗消息人士的话：谈判中仍存在3个核心争议 🔹 霍尔木兹海峡：伊朗称只有在最终协议达成后才会重新开放 🔹 浓缩铀：在失败的妥协后，约400公斤的问题仍未解决 🔹 被冻结的资金：德黑兰要求释放存放在国外的约270亿美元 推文

text: Open Source Intel USS Ford and its carrier strike group in the Mediterranean have completed a resupply of ammunition and supplies. This week could see three U.S. carrier strike groups in CENTCOM area: •USS Lincoln •USS Ford •USS Bush 🇺🇸 USN TRACKING: CSG-12 Location Confirmed Even with the deliberate delays on Eastern Med imagery, an Apr 10 pass finally dropped and definitively answers the whereabouts of the USS Gerald R. Ford (CVN-78). 🔸 Caught CSG-12 during an UNREP day. CVN-78 is pulling up alongside (or just finished) a Supply-class fast combat support ship (USNS Supply), flanked by 2x Arleigh Burke-class destroyers. The group is operating ~360km SW of RAF Akrotiri This capture puts the recent Red Sea SAR anomaly to bed. The Ford has not pushed south through the Suez; she remains firmly stationed in the Eastern Med. - MT Anderson tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 位于地中海的福特号航母及其航母打击群已完成弹药和补给的补给。本周可能会有三个美国航母打击群出现在中央司令部区域：•林肯号 •福特号 •布什号 🇺🇸 美国海军追踪：CSG-12位置已确认 即使东地中海图像有刻意延迟，4月10日的过境最终还是发布了，并明确回答了杰拉尔德·R·福特号（CVN-78）的下落。 🔸 在海上补给日捕捉到了CSG-12。CVN-78正停靠在（或刚刚完成）一艘补给级快速战斗支援舰（USNS Supply）旁边，两侧有2艘阿利·伯克级驱逐舰。该编队在阿克罗蒂里皇家空军基地西南约360公里处行动。这次捕捉平息了最近红海搜救异常的传言。福特号没有向南穿过苏伊士运河；它仍然稳稳地驻扎在地中海东部。 - MT Anderson 推文

text: OSINTdefender After two previous attempts over the previous several hours, the Pakistani-flagged crude oil tanker "Shalamar" appears to be proceeding inbound to the Persian Gulf through the Strait of Hormuz. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043283680743801245/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在过去几个小时内进行了两次尝试后，巴基斯坦籍原油油轮“Shalamar”号似乎正在通过霍尔木兹海峡进入波斯湾。 https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2043283680743801245/photo/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 CNN: U.S. Vice President JD Vance said no agreement was reached with Iran after 21 hours of marathon talks in Islamabad, with the US giving its “final and best offer." Iran’s lead negotiator, parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, said the…" ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 Saudi Arabia has restored its East‑West oil pipeline to full capacity after attacks last week that caused a loss of approximately 700,000 barrels per day. The 1,200‑kilometre pipeline bypasses the Strait of Hormuz. Pumping capacity has returned to about 7 million barrels per day, with Manifa field producing 300,000 barrels per day. Work continues to restore full production at the Khurais field. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰 CNN：美国副总统JD·万斯表示，在伊斯兰堡进行了21小时的马拉松式谈判后，与伊朗没有达成任何协议，美国给出了其‘最终且最好的提议’。伊朗首席谈判代表、议会议长穆罕默德-巴盖尔·卡利巴夫表示……” ⚡️ 🇸🇦 🇮🇷 沙特阿拉伯在上次袭击导致每天损失约70万桶石油后，已将其东西向输油管道恢复至满负荷运转。这条1200公里的管道绕过了霍尔木兹海峡。泵送能力已恢复到每天约700万桶，曼尼法油田每天生产30万桶。恢复库赖斯油田全面生产的工作仍在继续。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰🇱🇧 US‑Iran talks in Islamabad ended without a breakthrough after nine hours. Iran presented reasonable initiatives but excessive U.S. demands prevented a framework, Per Tasnim. The Key obstacles: Lebanon and the Strait of Hormuz. The U.S. refused…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 CNN : U.S. Vice President JD Vance said no agreement was reached with Iran after 21 hours of marathon talks in Islamabad, with the US giving its “final and best offer." Iran’s lead negotiator, parliament speaker Mohammad-Bagher Ghalibaf, said the US failed to gain the trust of the Iranian delegation. Primary sticking points included Iran’s refusal to abandon its nuclear programme. The future of the two‑week ceasefire and the reopening of the Strait of Hormuz are now in doubt. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇵🇰🇱🇧 伊斯兰堡的美伊谈判在九小时后结束，没有取得突破。据塔斯尼姆通讯社报道，伊朗提出了合理的倡议，但美国过分的要求阻碍了框架的达成。主要障碍：黎巴嫩和霍尔木兹海峡。美国拒绝……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 CNN：美国副总统JD·万斯表示，在伊斯兰堡进行了21小时的马拉松式谈判后，与伊朗没有达成任何协议，美国给出了其‘最终且最好的提议’。伊朗首席谈判代表、议会议长穆罕默德-巴盖尔·卡利巴夫表示，美国未能赢得伊朗代表团的信任。主要症结包括伊朗拒绝放弃其核计划。为期两周的停火和霍尔木兹海峡的重新开放的前景现在令人怀疑。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf: "The United States failed to gain Iran’s trust in response to our initiatives." ➡️ Before the negotiations, I emphasized that we have the necessary goodwill and determination, but due to the experiences of the previous two wars, we do not trust the other side. ➡️ My colleagues in the Iranian delegation at “Minab 168” presented forward-looking initiatives, but in the end, the other side failed to earn the trust of the Iranian delegation in this round of talks. ➡️ The United States understood our logic and principles, and now it is time for it to decide whether it can gain our trust or not. ➡️ At all times, we consider “power-based diplomacy” as another approach alongside military struggle to secure the rights of the Iranian people, and we will not cease for a moment our efforts to consolidate the achievements of 40 days of Iran’s national defense. ➡️ I appreciate the efforts of the friendly and brotherly country of Pakistan in facilitating this negotiation process, and I send my greetings to the people of Pakistan. ➡️ Iran is one body with 90 million souls. I thank the entire heroic nation of Iran, who—following the guidance of the Supreme Leader—supported their compatriots by taking to the streets and sending their prayers with us. I also commend my colleagues for their efforts in these intensive 21-hour negotiations. ➡️ Long live and prosper beloved Iran! 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫：“美国未能赢得伊朗对我们倡议的回应的信任。” ➡️ 在谈判之前，我强调我们有必要的善意和决心，但由于前两次战争的经历，我们不信任对方。 ➡️ 我在“Minab 168”的伊朗代表团同事提出了前瞻性的倡议，但最终，对方在本轮谈判中未能赢得伊朗代表团的信任。 ➡️ 美国理解了我们的逻辑和原则，现在是时候让它决定是否能赢得我们的信任了。 ➡️ 我们始终将“基于实力的外交”视为与军事斗争并行的另一种保障伊朗人民权利的方法，我们将不会有片刻停止巩固伊朗40天国防成就的努力。 ➡️ 我感谢友好和兄弟国家巴基斯坦在促进这一谈判进程中所做的努力，并向巴基斯坦人民致以问候。 ➡️ 伊朗是一个拥有9000万灵魂的整体。我感谢整个英雄的伊朗民族，他们——遵循最高领袖的指导——通过走上街头并与我们一起祈祷来支持他们的同胞。我也赞扬我的同事们在这次紧张的21小时谈判中所做的努力。 ➡️ 亲爱的伊朗万岁，繁荣昌盛！ 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Argentina’s debt to the IMF has climbed about 36% over the past year to roughly $57 billion, largely due to a new $20 billion. The new disbursements have increased Argentina’s total exposure, making it the IMF’s largest borrower.
text_zh: 阿根廷对国际货币基金组织的债务在过去一年中攀升了约36%，达到约570亿美元，这主要是由于一笔新的200亿美元贷款。新的拨款增加了阿根廷的总风险敞口，使其成为国际货币基金组织最大的借款国。

text: Iranian lawmaker says if the US does not pay war compensation, Iran will seize and sell hostile ships in the Persian Gulf.
text_zh: 伊朗议员称，如果美国不支付战争赔偿，伊朗将扣押并出售波斯湾的敌对船只。

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Iran Screenshot: Deputy Chief of Iran's Supreme National Security Council details how Iran entered negotiations with the United States. ENGLISH SUBS IranScreenshot 🤩
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Iran Screenshot：伊朗最高国家安全委员会副秘书详细介绍了伊朗如何与美国进行谈判。英文字幕 IranScreenshot 🤩

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 An adviser to Iran’s Supreme Leader, Ali Akbar Velayati, said that “the keys to the Strait of Hormuz are in our hands”. Iranian First Vice President Mohammad Reza Aref added: “We will defend the rights of our people, from control of the Strait of Hormuz to obtaining war reparations.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗最高领袖顾问阿里·阿克巴尔·韦拉亚蒂表示，“霍尔木兹海峡的钥匙掌握在我们手中”。伊朗第一副总统穆罕默德·礼萨·阿雷夫补充说：“我们将捍卫我们人民的权利，从控制霍尔木兹海峡到获得战争赔偿。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇺🇸 Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam has decided to delay his trip to the United Nations and the United States in order to continue managing the government’s work from Beirut amid the current internal situation. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇸🇾 MTV: Lebanese Prime Minister Nawaf Salam has postponed his U.S. visit after internal advice warned of a potential trap involving an alleged secret meeting with an Israeli envoy. He may face pressure to meet Israeli representatives, risking domestic backlash. The visit has not been cancelled. Lebanese officials confirmed that Lebanon has separated its issue from Iran’s in preliminary talks with the U.S. and Israel, insisting on a ceasefire before negotiations. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇺🇸 黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆决定推迟前往联合国和美国的行程，以便在当前内部局势下继续从贝鲁特管理政府工作。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇮🇷 🇸🇾 MTV：黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆在内部建议警告可能涉及与以色列特使秘密会面的陷阱后，推迟了美国之行。他可能面临会见以色列代表的压力，从而冒着国内强烈反对的风险。访问并未取消。黎巴嫩官员证实，黎巴嫩在与美国和以色列的初步会谈中已将其问题与伊朗的问题分开，坚持在谈判前实现停火。 @wfwitness
